title: replace_in_dops_block
description: Edit text inside the body of an `mk target set <name>` heredoc in overlay.dops. Use when convert produced a structurally valid overlay whose target-recipe contents are internally broken (e.g. wrong ${WRKSRC}/../../ paths, drifted REINPLACE_CMD arguments). No other intent can reach heredoc bodies.

block_name.description: Name of the mk target block: the token after `mk target set` (e.g. `dfly-patch`, `post-extract`).

find.description: Exact substring to replace inside the heredoc body. Must occur at least once in the block; refused if non-unique unless occurrence is specified.

occurrence.description: Which match to replace if find is non-unique inside the block (1-based).
